---
name: Dataset request
about: Suggest a new dataset to include
title: "[Data request] "
labels: enhancement, data
assignees: ''
---

**Dataset name**
What is the dataset?

**Source URL**
Where is this data published?

**Publisher / Authority**
Which government body or organization publishes it?

**License**
What license is the data under? (Provide URL if available)

**Coverage**
Geographic scope (national, state-specific, city-specific)?

**Format**
What format(s) is the data available in?

**Why include it?**
How does this dataset complement the existing collection?
